sections.paragraph: ῥαββί [Heb. ‘my master’] a title used in address of Israelite teachers respected for their knowledge of Mosaic tradition, my master, sir, rabbi, in general Mt 23:7f; of John the Baptist J 3:26; otherwise always of Jesus Mt 26:25, 49; Mk 9:5; 10:51 v.l.; 11:21; 14:45; J 1:38 (here translated διδάσκαλος teacher) and oft. in J.
